## Pull Request Type

Repository maintenance

---

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one repository concern.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if contributor workflow, installation, or validation changed.
- [ ] GitHub templates remain aligned with the repository workflow instructions.
- [ ] Tooling or CI changes include validation notes or expected CI coverage.
- [ ] The change does not alter skill behavior unless that behavior is described below.
- [ ] No local paths, credentials, private URLs, or workspace-specific details.

---
